title: NeuronAction
description: Action schema shared between Android (Kotlin) and Server (Python). Single source of truth for all actions that Neuron can execute on the device.

action_type.description: Type of action to execute. 'done' = task complete, 'error' = task failed, 'confirm' = needs user approval

target_id.description: Resource ID of target UI element (e.g., 'com.example.app:id/button'). Optional for some action types.

target_text.description: Visible text of target element, used as fallback if resource_id unavailable

value.description: Action parameter: text to type, swipe direction (up/down/left/right), or app package name to launch

confidence.description: LLM confidence score 0-1. Values < 0.7 should trigger confirmation gate.

reasoning.description: Why this action was chosen. Used for debugging and user understanding.

requires_confirmation.description: If true, Neuron pauses and waits for user approval before executing. Used for sensitive actions or low-confidence decisions.

timeout_ms.description: Optional timeout for action execution in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.

retry_count.description: Number of times to retry if action fails

sensitive.description: If true, this action involves sensitive data (passwords, PII, financial) and goes through SensitivityGate

examples.reasoning: User asked to send message. Located send button in UI tree.
User wants to search settings for battery info
User asked to open Messages app
Need to scroll page down to find next relevant element
Could not find the requested element or perform the action
Low confidence on payment amount. Requires user confirmation before proceeding.
